rows: {"en": "Scroll of Cosmic Inscription", "ja": "宇宙刻文の巻物"}
{"en": "A scroll containing special powers. Inscribed onto an item to randomly grant one of several stat boosts.", "ja": "特別な能力を秘めた巻物。アイテムに碑文を刻み、複数の能力向上効果のうち1つをランダムに付与する。"}
